title: Golden Berries
description: Adds Golden Berries for Sweet Berries like Apples have Golden Apples.
body:
# Golden Berries

This mod adds Golden Berries as a new food source similar to Golden Apples.
Like Apples have Golden Apples and carrots have Golden Carrots, now Sweet Berries have Golden Berries.

They're crafted with 1 Sweet Berry in the middle and 8 Gold Nuggets.

### Crafting Recipe
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c0e3ca22aff9c47e9950085657626152d858d0.png)

When consumed, they give food, saturation and 2 effects: Absorption and Regeneration for 3 seconds.
